ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the agent (e.g., Q-learning, SARSA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agent */,
  "agent_version" TEXT /* Version of the agent */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for the agent */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Initial performance metrics of the agent */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "env_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the environment (e.g., grid world, game environment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "environment_version" TEXT /* Version of the environment */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the environment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment used in the experiment */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent used in the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "experiment_version" TEXT /* Version of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., planned, running, completed, paused) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the experiment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the episode belongs to */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number in the experiment */,
  "steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps taken in the episode */,
  "total_reward" REAL /* Total reward obtained in the episode */,
  "episode_version" TEXT /* Version of the episode */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the episode (e.g., started, running, completed, failed) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the episode */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_exp_id FOREIGN KEY ("exp_id") REFERENCES experiments ("exp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the reward belongs to */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent that obtained the reward */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward obtained by the agent */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Step number at which the reward was obtained */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of the reward (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "reward_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the reward */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_rewards_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_rewards_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used for the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_exp_id FOREIGN KEY ("exp_id") REFERENCES experiments ("exp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_exp_id FOREIGN KEY ("exp_id") REFERENCES experiments ("exp_id")
)
